groups.label: Parts of the Declaration of Independence
groups.explanation: The Preamble, the list of grievances, the natural rights section, and the signatures are all parts of the Declaration of Independence.

groups.label: Amendments That Expanded Voting Rights
groups.explanation: The 15th, 19th, 24th, and 26th Amendments each expanded who could vote in the United States.

groups.label: Former British Colonies
groups.explanation: India, Australia, Canada, and Hong Kong were all once colonies or territories of the British Empire.

groups.label: 20th-Century Inventions
groups.explanation: The airplane, television, the internet, and penicillin were all invented in the 20th century.
